      • DMS_DRIVER_FATIGUE_STATUS

        static final int DMS_DRIVER_FATIGUE_STATUS
        Driver fatigue status. Driver state is conveyed, including unknown, normal, distracted, and fatigued. 驾驶员疲劳状态。驾驶员状态透出，包含未知、正常、分心、疲劳。
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ

      • DMS_DRIVER_FACIAL_EXPRESSION

        static final int DMS_DRIVER_FACIAL_EXPRESSION
        Driver facial expressions. Driver facial expressions are conveyed, including unknown, happy, angry, surprised, calm, and sad. 驾驶员面部表情。驾驶员面部表情透出，包含未知，高兴，愤怒，惊讶，平静，伤心
        • ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ
